programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: The team's Halloween plans are interrupted when the vice president's son's plane goes down with a mysterious prisoner on board.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: Mac and the team attempt to extinguish a massive oil wellhead fire set by a rebel group in Nigeria.

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby investigates whether a ballad made famous by a late, lamented folk singer could have been the inspiration for a murder.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: On the Edge
programme.desc: When a young basketball player becomes entangled with drug dealers, he turns to an ex-cop and former private eye. Starring Ice-T, Gary Busey, Fred Williamson and Jim Brown.

programme.title: Honest Thief
programme.desc: Wanting to lead an honest life, a notorious bank robber (Liam Neeson) turns himself in, only to be double-crossed by two ruthless FBI agents.

programme.title: Gang of Roses
programme.desc: A gang of gold-hunting outlaws, headed by the ruthless Left Eye Watkins (Bobby Brown), takes over the peaceful town of Flatridge, tearing the sleepy outpost to shreds as they search for riches. They murder a can-can girl, who is the sister of Rachel (Monica Calhoun), the onetime leader of a notorious all-girl gang. Rachel then rounds up her four old associates, and they seek revenge for her sister. Using teamwork and a sassy attitude, Rachel's gang goes up against Watkins' tough crew.

programme.title: The Code
programme.desc: A veteran thief recruits a younger crook to help him pull off one final job in order to repay his debt to the Russian mob.

programme.title: Megafault
programme.desc: A seismologist and a miner must stop a massive earthquake that threatens to tear the world in half. Starring Brittany Murphy.

programme.title: Jobs
programme.desc: The story of Steve Jobs' ascension from college dropout into one of the most revered creative entrepreneurs of the 20th century

programme.title: Two For the Money
programme.desc: Brandon Lang loves football: an injury keeps him from the pros.

programme.title: Downfall
programme.desc: Traudl Junge, the final secretary for Adolf Hitler, tells of the Nazi dictator's final days in his Berlin bunker

programme.title: A River Runs Through It
programme.desc: Craig Sheffer and Brad Pitt star as two brothers who rebel against their stern father and become men in the majesty of the Montana wilderness.

programme.title: Fire on the Mountain
programme.desc: The story of one man's defiance of the United States government. The hero, John Vogelin, is an old rancher.

programme.title: Whatever It Takes
programme.desc: A nerdy high school senior and the class jock conspire to help each other win the hearts of their dream girls.

programme.title: Private Valentine: Blonde & Dangerous
programme.desc: A naive pop singer attempts to win approval from a producer and a studio that think her unsuitable for their upcoming military-themed movie. To prove them wrong and win the role, she enlists in the Army.

programme.title: You Can't Take It With You
programme.desc: Lionel Barrymore is the eccentric patriarch of a clan of frustrated artists who decided 30 years earlier to retire from the rat race and use his fortune to encourage friends and family to pursue vocations that really interest them. At the center of his family is his granddaughter, Jean Arthur, who is carrying on a romance with her boss son, James Stewart.

programme.title: A Dandy In Aspic
programme.desc: British Intelligence orders its operatives to eliminate a Soviet spy, never realizing he's one of their own men - a double agent.

programme.title: Don't Knock The Twist
programme.desc: Following the preparations for a TV special on the twist, this rock 'n' roll musical features performances by Chubby Checker, Gene Chandler, Vic Dana, The Carroll Brothers and the Dovells. Musical numbers include "Duke of Earl," "Do the New Continental" and "Mash Potato Time".

programme.title: The Undercover Man
programme.desc: Al Capone's arrest for tax evasion was the inspiration behind THE UNDERCOVER MAN, a crime thriller in which Glenn Ford stars as a Treasury Department employee out to nab a character referred to only as the "Big Fellow" (Den Harvey) who owes more than $3 million in back taxes.

programme.title: On Golden Pond
programme.desc: The legendary Henry Fonda and Katharine Hepburn star in one of the 1980s' most honored and cherished films, On Golden Pond. Norman is a curmudgeon with an estranged relationship with his daughter Chelsea. At Golden Pond, he and his wife nevertheless agree to care for Billy, the son of Chelsea's new boyfriend, and a most unexpected relationship blooms.

programme.title: Before The Devil Knows You're Dead
programme.desc: Master filmmaker Sidney Lumet (The Verdict, Dog Day Afternoon, Serpico) delivers "one of his greatest achievements" (Roger Ebert) with this riveting and compelling suspense thriller. Oscar-winner* Philip Seymour Hoffman (Capote) is Andy, an overextended payroll executive who lures his younger brother, Hank (Ethan Hawke, Training Day), into a larcenous scheme: the pair will rob a suburban mom-and-pop jewelry store that appears to be the quintessential easy target. The problem is, the store owners are Andy and Hank's real mom and pop, and when the seemingly perfect crime goes awry, the damage sends them hurtling toward a shattering clash that may obliterate their already precarious lives.

programme.title: Battle Of Algiers
programme.desc: In the 1950s, fear and violence escalate as the people of Algiers fight for independence from the French government.

programme.title: Dog Soldiers
programme.desc: A routine military exercise turns into a nightmare in the Scotland wilderness.

programme.title: Rumble Through the Dark
programme.desc: A fighter seeks to repay his debts in a final attempt to salvage the family home of his dying foster mother.

programme.title: Kickboxer
programme.desc: Kurt must learn the ancient kick boxing art of Muay Thai in order to avenge his brother.

programme.title: Man of Tai Chi
programme.desc: A young martial artist's unparalleled Tai Chi skills land him in a highly lucrative underworld fight club.

programme.title: Never Back Down
programme.desc: A rebellious teen starts at a new school, where he becomes caught up in the underground fight scene.

programme.title: Her Deadly Game
programme.desc: When her childhood friend Kayla transfers to her college basketball team, Andrea's reunion turns into a nightmare. Kayla, obsessed with being Andrea's one and only best friend, will harm anyone who gets in her way.

programme.title: A Witness to Murder
programme.desc: Sanitation worker MaryBeth is in the wrong place at the wrong time when the mayor's wife is murdered. She refuses to talk to the sheriff she dislikes, but the killers know she was there. Now they're coming for her to make sure she stays silent.

programme.title: Space Ranger
programme.desc: The Space Ranger program, set up to protect humans from intergalactic threats in the future, is opened back up when a new threat arrives on Earth, threatening to destroy humanity once and for all.

programme.title: Meteor: Day One
programme.desc: A quest begins to find an ancient dial that controls the skies.

programme.title: Her Deadly Game
programme.desc: When her childhood friend Kayla transfers to her college basketball team, Andrea's reunion turns into a nightmare. Kayla, obsessed with being Andrea's one and only best friend, will harm anyone who gets in her way.

programme.title: Meteor: Day One
programme.desc: A quest begins to find an ancient dial that controls the skies.

programme.title: Ip Man 4: The Finale
programme.desc: Ip Man and his son encounter racial discrimination after traveling to the United States to seek a better life.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in Shanghai
programme.desc: A laborer moves to Shanghai to become rich, and has to use his kung-fu skills to survive.

programme.title: Escape From Mogadishu
programme.desc: Rival diplomats from North Korea and South Korea become trapped as civil war rages in Mogadishu, Somalia. With no aid from either government, their only shot at survival requires uniting with bitter adversaries to escape.

programme.title: Legend of Gatotkaca
programme.desc: Legends collide as young Yuda wrestles to unlock newfound god-like powers, defending his world in an endless battle against ancient and powerful evils.

programme.title: Hunt for Truth
programme.desc: Carrie Evans uncovers unsettling truths about her family and boss Caswell Foxx while researching a major case.

programme.title: The New Wife
programme.desc: Six months after burying her husband, Ruby Asher seduces then murders Nicholas Landon, a wealthy politician.

programme.title: Be Mine
programme.desc: A woman finds romance as she prepares to take over her mother's garden store.

programme.title: Meet Me in New York
programme.desc: Events planner Kelly meets her match in web editor Joe when planning his niece's birthday party.

programme.title: At Home With Tori
programme.desc: Tori teams up with Josh Flagg to create a backyard summer camp-out with the Troop Beverly Hills theme.

programme.title: The Bouquet
programme.desc: Two estranged sisters set aside their differences to help their mother save her floral business.

programme.title: Rule of Thirds
programme.desc: Monte Ashcroft, a world-class editorial photographer, finds love in a new muse-until a secret threatens to unravel everything.

programme.title: Nine Lives
programme.desc: Following a traumatic experience, former Special Forces member Dean Cage (Wesley Snipes) is trying to pick up the pieces of his fractured life. With the help of detective Amy Knight (Jacqueline Obradors), Dean tries to block out the painful wartime memories, including the death of his best friend. Everything goes awry, however, when Dean is mistaken for a rogue CIA agent. He is abducted and given a truth serum, and now he must find an antidote to the debilitating psychotropic drug.

programme.title: Mafia
programme.desc: In the 1970s, a fierce crime boss (Ving Rhames) wreaks havoc across the streets, and it's up to hardened detective James Womack (Pam Grier) and her partner Dupree (Robert Patrick) to put an end to organized crime - even if it means breaking the law.

programme.title: Animal
programme.desc: When dangerous street thug James "Animal" Allen (Ving Rhames) is sent to prison, he continues his violent ways working for fellow inmate Kassada (Chazz Palminteri). This changes after Animal encounters Berwell (Jim Brown), a revolutionary who introduces him to the writings of Malcolm X. Animal reforms, realizing that murder and crime are destroying his community. After Animal is released, he goes home to find his son, Darius (Terrence Dashon Howard), involved in gang activity just like he was.

programme.title: Edison
programme.desc: Ambitious young reporter Pollack (Justin Timberlake) suspects insidious corruption in his town's elite police unit, known as F.R.A.T., and finds a friendly source in Deed (LL Cool J), a dissatisfied member of the squad. With Deed's information and the backing of his publisher, Ashford (Morgan Freeman), and a crusading lawyer, Wallace (Kevin Spacey), Pollack infiltrates the secretive police cabal. He finds himself in over his head, however, when he discovers the true extent of the criminality.

programme.title: Trapped in the Game: Fool Me Once
programme.desc: When FBI agent Dallas Bush is assigned to take down a powerful businessman turned drug lord, he realizes the payout could cover his dying mother’s medical expenses. Dallas must navigate a dangerous web of deception, crime, and moral compromise, where every choice comes with a price.

programme.title: THREE
programme.desc: Hair Stylist, TIffany LaCroix and her Programmer fiancee Jayson Alexander live a relatively simple life until Jayson asks for a very intimate 30th birthday present. He wants to have a threesome with Tiffany and her lesbian best friend Ashley. Against her better judgement and the advice of her friends, Tiffany agrees to the menage a trois. But what seems like a dream come true for Jayson, leads to jealousy, betrayal and a trail of broken hearts.

programme.title: Crush
programme.desc: Haunted by her past, a young woman's life is complicated by love, self-discovery, and surrounding violence.

programme.title: Rich Intent
programme.desc: 16-year-old Quana yearns to go to her very first concert. When she gets the opportunity to see her favorite artist, her dreams quickly spiral into a horrific nightmare of imprisonment and shady deals.

programme.title: Deceptive Touch
programme.desc: Cam believes she’s finally found “The One” in her charismatic boyfriend Ant. Everything seems perfect until a shocking discovery about Ant’s past threatens to unravel their idyllic life. As Cam digs for answers, passion turns into paranoia, and a twisted game of lies and manipulation threatens to destroy everything she thought she knew.

programme.title: His Masterpiece
programme.desc: Victoria and Richard are divorced spouses that operate an art gallery together. After meeting young artist Daniel at a community event, they decide to collaborate with him on the exhibit to generate income for their tax obligations. However, Richard's aggressive nature and ulterior motives soon come to light, leading to a dangerous jealousy within him.

programme.title: Avengers Grimm
programme.desc: Fairytale princesses are taken to Earth by Rumpelstiltskin. Now they must fight to save the planet from him.

programme.title: A Haunting in Salem
programme.desc: The new sheriff of Salem, Mass., discovers he is cursed, and must protect his family from vengeful ghosts.

programme.title: The Amityville Haunting
programme.desc: Found footage that documents the horrifying experience of a family that moved into the infamous haunted house.

programme.title: Aquarium of the Dead
programme.desc: When an accident turns animals in an aquarium to zombies, the employees have no choice but to fight back.

programme.title: Anneliese: The Exorcist Tapes
programme.desc: An authentic videotape reveals the shocking account of history's most infamous demonic possession.

programme.title: Megaboa
programme.desc: College students look for cave drawings in Columbia, but find a once-extinct and deadly 50-foot boa constrictor.

programme.title: Little Dead Rotting Hood (Edited Version)
programme.desc: For years, the old woman in the woods has secretly kept the wolves of the forest at bay. But when the woman dies, the creatures suddenly attack the residents of a nearby small town. As more and more people turn up dead, the townsfolk discover something far more sinister than wolves lurking in the backwoods, and fight to save their home from evil by waging a bloody battle against the ruthless creatures. But as the wolves begin to overpower the town, only the womans granddaughter may have the key to stopping the bloodbath before its too late.

programme.desc: You may be home, but youre not alone. Better Watch Out puts a gleefully twisted new spin on the home-invasion thriller, following babysitter Ashley, who must defend her young charges against intruders one snowy night or so she thinks.

programme.title: Bloody Bites
programme.desc: An easy job turns into a struggle for survival for a HVAC repair man. Stuck to the roof, he must escape before night falls and the real horror begins.

programme.title: The Haunting of Molly Hartley
programme.desc: Molly Hartley hopes that with her mother locked away in a mental ward, she canforget the violence of her familys past and start over. She has found a new life, a new school and a new boyfriend. But when her secret past and haunting nightmares continue, Molly fears she has inherited her mothers psychosis. What she doesnt know is that shes inherited something else a secret far more horrifying than any fate she can imagine and a destiny she cannot avoid.

programme.title: Magic
programme.desc: Anthony Hopkins plays a ventriloquist whose dummy has a murderous mind of its own in this chilling psychological horror film written by legendary Hollywood scribe William Goldman.

programme.title: Last Ones Out
programme.desc: Waking from surgery, Henry finds himself alone, in the dark, and in a hospital that has been overrun by a horde of flesh-hungry zombies. Together with the last few survivors, Henry must find a path to safety.

programme.title: Warning: Do Not Play
programme.desc: An aspiring director hunts down a film said to be shot... by a ghost. A SHUDDER ORIGINAL.

programme.title: Party Hard, Die Young
programme.desc: A graduation getaway is grounds for a slasher in this slick teen scream.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Races Jetherine" - When Sonny Drysdale promises to give Elly May a ring, Granny thinks he's going to propose and becomes a matchmaker. Cousin Pearl can't stand the idea that Elly May will get married before Jethrine, so she sets to matchmaking Jethrine with Jasper Depew.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Pygmalion and Elly" - Sonny Drysdale decides he needs to be Pygmalion to Elly's Galatea and remake her from a hillbilly into a woman of society, while Granny uses love charms to heat up their relationship.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly's First Date" - Mr. Drysdale convinces his self-absorbed stepson Sonny to date Elly May to Mrs. Drysdale's consternation, while Granny and Jed make preparations for Thanksgiving.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jethro Goes to School" - Jed enrolls Jethro at an exclusive Beverly Hills elementary school. Millicent Schuyler-Potts, the proprietor of the school, is aghast when Jed and Jethro show up, convinced this is part of some ghastly hoax. After Jed says that banker Milburn Drysdale is his neighbor, she calls the banker. It turns out that Drysdale's bank holds the mortgage on the school. Schulyer-Potts suddenly warms to the charms of the Clampetts, even if it means accepting Jethro as a fifth grader.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Servants" - Ellie May starts wearing dresses but takes it as an insult when someone says she looks like a city girl. Mr. Drysdale talks Jed into taking in his butler and upstairs girl in a plan to civilize the Clampetts, but they don't quite understand the idea of servants. Miss Hathaway takes Jethro bowling and begins to show an interest in him.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Get Culture" - The Clampetts decide to get a taste of culture to fit in the high-class society of Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Go Hollywood" - When Jake Clampett tells Jed he's his cousin, he's welcomed into the home and soon has everyone but Jed thinking about and dressing for a role in their next movie.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Are Overdrawn" - The Clampetts receive an overdraft from the bank intended for the deadbeat actor J.D. 'Jake' Clampett, while he gets their statement and starts to spend their money.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.desc: A pair of grizzled frontiersmen and trappers search for a legendary valley rumored to be full of beaver.

programme.desc: A Native American passing as white squares off against a bigoted ranching family on the Oklahoma frontier.

programme.title: Lost Canyon
programme.desc: When Johnny Travers (Jay Kirby) is falsely accused of robbing a bank, it's up to Hopalong Cassidy (William Boyd) to clear his name and find the real villains. There's nothing better than watching Hoppy get rough with the rustlers, and it's all the better when you get to hear the Sportsmen Quartette sing (I got Spurs) Jingle, Jangle, Jingle.

programme.title: Santa Fe Trail
programme.desc: Oscar winner Michael Curtiz (Casablanca, Mildred Pierce) directed this exciting drama about Army officer Jeb Stuart and the days leading up to the Civil War. Errol Flynn (The Adventures of Robin Hood) stars as Stuart, with Olivia de Havilland as his romantic interest (the seventh of nine times they were paired together by Warner Bros.) The cast includes Ronald Reagan as General George Custer, and Raymond Massey as John Brown, with such familiar faces as Alan Hale and Van Hefflin in supporting roles. Filmed partly in Santa Fe!

programme.title: Springtime in the Sierras
programme.desc: Ads for this Roy Rogers classic roared HEAD FOR THE MUSICAL HILLS...ROY IS GUNNIN' FOR THRILLS! And thrills are what you'll get when you watch this fun, action packed B-Western from Republic Pictures. There's some great comic relief from Andy Devine and Chester Conklin, two of Hollywood's all-time greats. This old-fashioned shoot-'em-up was directed by William Witney, who would go on to direct many of television's top western sagas, including Bonanza, Wagon Train, and The Wild, Wild West.

programme.title: The Two Gun Man
programme.desc: Ken Maynard stars in this vintage western about ranchers under threat from hired gunmen. Director Phil Rosen, whose career dated back to working with Thomas Edison and included several Charlie Chan features, keeps the action hot with help from a strong ensemble, including Charles King, Murdock MacQuarrie, and a horse named Tarzan! Maynard plays Blackie Weed, a marshall going undercover to capture and arrest some cattle rustlers.He finds himself up against some very bad men, and he's soon framed for murder. Watch as Blackie blazes his way to vindication with a .45 in either hand and the flame of righteous anger in his eyes... Kitty: Nita Martin. Joe Kearney: Lafe McKee. Lem Tolliver: Tom London. Ranch Foreman: Walter Perry

programme.title: Diamond Trail
programme.desc: Diamond Trail is an epic that starts in the speeding taxicabs and illegal barrooms of the east coast, and travels west for its exciting climax. Reporter Speed Morgan (Rex Bell), going undercover as Frisco Eddy, infiltrates Flash Barrett's gang in order to bring them all to justice. But can he get the job done before they learn his identity? With a cast that includes Frances Rich and Bud Osborne, this action tale from director Harry L. Fraser (The Last of the Clintons) is another forgotten classic from Monogram Pictures.

programme.title: Fast Bullets
programme.desc: Tom Tyler stars in this vintage western from the short-lived Reliable Pictures Company, a group known for low budgets and lots of action. In this feature, Tom reforms a gang member in order to infiltrate a ring of thieves. Rex Lease, Margaret Nearing, and Al Bridge also star.

programme.title: Taken From Rio Bravo
programme.desc: Two friends pursue a group of human traffickers that have kidnapped five women in 1874, East Texas.

programme.title: Doc Holliday
programme.desc: Doc Holliday runs a small dental practice in rural Georgia when he is visited by Wyatt Earp and offered a chance to become a United States Deputy. All Doc has to do is capture the Bridle Brothers - two of most notorious outlaws the West has ever seen. The Doc sets out on an adventure like none other to find these hardened criminals and ends up forging a friendship with Wyatt Earp that would carry into the events of Tombstone.

programme.title: Hidden Creek

programme.title: Richard Hammond needs your help – NEW TV SHOW IDEA!
programme.desc: Welcome to something a bit different on DriveTribe – a new TV show pilot! We have worked really hard on this one to make it arguably the biggest project we've ever filmed for the channel! Richard Hammond hates these two cars, so let him explain how he plans to 'cull the herd' and move the car industry in the right direction.

programme.title: James May ROASTS the DriveTribe Dodge Charger Hellcat!
programme.desc: The Dodge Charger Hellcat Widebody became a new addition to the DriveTribe garage this year. With over 700hp from its thumping great V8, we decided to see what Mr James May thought of it. Not much, it turns out...

programme.title: Fixing Richard Hammond's Top Gear-era Jaguar | Project Jaaaag Ep.2
programme.desc: Richard Hammond's new Jaguar XJR is back at his workshop The Smallest Cog for a refresh. However all is not as it first seems with the car...

programme.title: V10 BMW M5 Touring Manual - Have We Built The Ultimate BMW?
programme.desc: After manual-swapping our BMW M5 Touring, there was only really one place we could take it for a first drive – the unrestricted Isle of Man! Mike gives the V10 estate the full send around the island, all while speculating on the future of analogue performance cars and whether such beasts will exist in the near future.

programme.title: Richard Hammond VS Pro Golfer | Which is FASTER?
programme.desc: Richard Hammond has historically not been the biggest fan of golf through the years, so we've put him and the DriveTribe M5 Touring up against the biggest golf YouTuber in the world, Rick Shiels. Choosing the old Aintree F1 track as the battleground, can our 500+hp V10 estate car beat some golf bats and a small white ball? Trust us, this is a good one...

programme.title: Some idiot crashed into Richard Hammond's pick-up truck
programme.desc: Someone crashed into Richard Hammond’s pick-up truck! Richard loves his Ford Ranger, his workhorse that he uses to commute to-and-from the Smallest Cog. But a few weeks ago, it was crashed into, ironically by one of Richard’s other cars from an upcoming Grand Tour special. Mike has decided to be a good samaritan and – while Richard was away on holiday – he set about fixing the boss’ truck.

programme.title: The Stig reveals what REALLY HAPPENED in the Top Gear 24-hour race | Le Mans road trip
programme.desc: The DriveTribe Dodge Charger has always deserved a good European road trip, so Mike invited ex-Stig Ben Collins to accompany him to the Le Mans Classic. And while on their journey, Mike gets the gossip on Ben's Le Mans career, as well as the infamous Top Gear 24 hour race... What really happened?

programme.title: Why are V10 engines completely gone from modern cars?
programme.desc: The V10 engine is all but gone from the car industry, but with the V8 and V12 still going strong, why has the V10 died? Mike Fernie takes the DriveTribe M5 Touring for a spin to investigate this mystery.

programme.title: Richard Hammond drives our manual V10 BMW estate for the last time!
programme.desc: The time has come – we are selling the DriveTribe BMW M5 Touring! It has run its course on the channel, mostly at 8,000rpm, and now it is time to move it on to a new lucky owner. But before then, Richard Hammond grabbed the keys for one last blast in Wales.

programme.title: Richard Hammond REACTS to all his crashes
programme.desc: It's been a running joke that Richard Hammond has had quite a few crashes over the years. We sat him down to watch a crash compilation and even he was surprised by how many there have been.

programme.title: We manual-swapped our cheap supercharged Jaguar! | Project Jaaaag Ep.3
programme.desc: In this episode of Project Jaaaag, the Japanese XKR grows three pedals and a gearstick!

programme.title: Richard Hammond has bought the Subaru Impreza from The Grand Tour!
programme.desc: Another new car joins the DriveTribe garage, and it's one you may have come across before! After taking a bit of a beating on the latest Grand Tour special, Richard decided to buy the Impreza WRX STI V-limited and is looking to fix it up and make it something truly special.

programme.title: Fixing our cheap supercharged V8 Jaguar! | Project Jaaaag Ep.7
programme.desc: Project Jaaaag continues with another pivotal part being made and installed into the XKR – a stunning exhaust system that will see the 4.0-litre V8 breathe at its best. Along with a fresh rear subframe, this Jag is starting to really come together...

programme.title: How is Richard Hammond's classic car business doing after 2 years?
programme.desc: With 2023 coming to a close, Mike Fernie grabs Chief Cog Neil Greenhouse for a walkaround of Richard Hammond's workshop to discuss the cars inside and how the business is doing after its second year in business.

programme.title: We (nearly) finished Richard Hammond's Top Gear-era Jaguar! | Project Jaaaag Ep.5
programme.desc: Richard Hammond's Top Gear era Jaguar build is coming to a close, but not quite!

programme.title: Rescuing Richard Hammond's Subaru Impreza from the secret Grand Tour compound!
programme.desc: Where do the cars from The Grand Tour go after a special has been filmed? Well, Mike Fernie takes a trip to the secret compound that the cars are kept at to rescue Richard Hammond's WRX STI Impreza and get it back to Hereford.

programme.title: Oliver the Opel has been restored at Richard Hammond's workshop!
programme.desc: Did you know that Oliver has been the wrong colour for the past decade or so? After a slightly rushed restoration back in the day, Richard handed Oliver over to the Smallest Cog to get it back to 'Africa spec', and in this video Mike goes for a walkaround with Neil Greenhouse to see how Oliver is doing.

programme.title: We bought a cheap supercharged V8 Jaguar! | Project Jaaaag Pt.1
programme.desc: A new project car is born! With Richard's Jaguar XJR not needing much done to it, Mike has bought the tattiest XKR he could find to restore and take on Hammond's car. Who will end up with the nicest supercharged Jag? Welcome to Project Jaaaag!

programme.title: Rescuing over 160bhp from our cheap supercharged Jaguar! | Project Jaaaag Ep.8
programme.desc: As we near the end of Project Jaaaag, it's time to get the car back on the dyno. Let's hope it goes better than the last time...

programme.title: Richard Hammond has been hiding this car for over a year!
programme.desc: Richard Hammond has bought back a car some of you might have seen before...

programme.title: V10 BMW M5 Touring Manual lap of the Nürburgring!
programme.desc: After taking our manual V10 estate to the Isle of Man for its first drive, Mike decided there was only one place to take it for one of its last drives on the DriveTribe channel. Mike straps in for a lap with Misha Charoudin – the YouTube King of the 'Ring – to experience the greatest circuit in the world in the M5.

programme.title: Driving The Last Car Richard Hammond Drove On Top Gear!
programme.desc: This MGB was the final car Richard Hammond ever got behind the wheel of on Top Gear. Now, he and the Smallest Cogs have turned it into a racecar, which Mike Fernie has been given the job of testing around the epic Llandow race circuit!

programme.title: Richard Hammond's entire year has come down to THIS
programme.desc: Having built and tested the Smallest Cog MGB, it's finally time to set it loose on track at the mighty Silverstone circuit. With Abbie Eaton and Anthony Greenhouse behind the wheel and Richard managing the team from the pits, can they get a result on the car's first proper outing?

programme.title: A walkaround of EVERYTHING in the DriveTribe car collection!
programme.desc: Take a look at everything that currently resides in the DriveTribe stable!

programme.title: Fixing our cheap supercharged V8 Jaguar! | Project Jaaaag Ep.4
programme.desc: Project Jaaaag continues with fixing everything that has gone wrong on our XKR's V8 engine. From gaskets to timing chain tensioners, Mike and the Swallows team make sure to seal up the engine and rescue some of the horsepower lost over the years.

programme.title: Fixing our cheap supercharged V8 Jaguar! | Project Jaaaag Ep.6
programme.desc: Project Jaaaag reaches its next stage, with this video's aim being to completely refresh the front subframe, making the underside of the car spotless before sorting everything on top! Oh, and Mike sits in a 2002 F1 car!

programme.title: Inside Richard Hammond’s timeless private clubhouse!
programme.desc: You may have seen snippets of it in past videos, but Richard now gives us a full tour of his private barn/clubhouse that has been a project of his for the past few years. Predictably, motorbikes have started to invade the space!

programme.title: Restoring Richard Hammond's Subaru from The Grand Tour | Project Martin Ep.2
programme.desc: After rescuing Martin the Subaru Impreza from the secret Grand Tour barn, Mike and the team at Torque GT start getting stuck in to restore him back to a good, solid STI. In today's video, we go in search of rust...

programme.title: Richard Hammond welcomes Shmee's legendary Clio V6 to The Smallest Cog!
programme.desc: You guys enjoyed our Cog Score videos to last year with Mat Armstrong and Jimmy Broadbent, so we're kick-starting this year with a true legend of car YouTube – Shmee150! He has brought his recently refreshed Clio V6 to The Smallest Cog for Mike and Anthony to critique, while Tim and Richard chat about the world that they're both in.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: Super High Roller (SHR)-The €100,000 Super High Roller reaches its climactic finale with six elite players vying for nearly €1.4 million. Leading the pack is 2015 Monte Carlo Main Event champion Adrian Mateos, facing off against poker heavyweights Mikita Badziakouski, László Bujtas, and Marius Gierse, plus wildcards Kent Staahle and Mikalai Vaskaboinikau. With life-changing money on the line, who will claim the prestigious title?

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: Main Event Episode 1 (ME1)-After a three-year hiatus, the prestigious EPT Monte Carlo €5,000 Main Event returns in spectacular fashion. Day 2 brings together poker's biggest names, including high-stakes specialist Patrik Antonius, World Champion Koray Aldemir, Italian ace Mustapha Kanit, and trailblazing two-time EPT champion Victoria Coren-Mitchell. The battle for poker immortality begins.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: Main Event Episode 2 (ME2)-Tension mounts as the money bubble approaches in Monte Carlo's Main Event. With 159 players set to cash for at least €8,690, every decision matters. EPT legends Patrik Antonius and Davidi Kitai command the feature table while 2019 PSPC champion Ramon Colillas holds the chip lead. Who will survive the bubble and who will go home empty-handed?

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Dave has returned from a lovely trip to Paris and has plenty to say about it. He talks about where he ate, such as the incredible Maison Sota, which he thinks deserves more praise, and the great Bruno Verjus, with Bruno's unique story. Dave also discusses where he didn't get to eat, but would love to support. Dave also talks about how Paris is changing before he answers an Ask Dave about cooking from scratch in restaurants and at home.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: On today's episode, Dave makes gazpacho fresh (1:01) and from (relatively) frozen (8:20) for special guest Goodboy Noah, known for his catchy recipe songs, hilarious online content, and his best pal Cheetah. During the interview (42:48), learn how a musical career was shaped into an internet cooking career, have a ton of laughs, and discover which of Goodboy Noah and Cheetah is Simon and which is Garfunkel.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show

He finishes with a MOIF on the important things: Batman, airplane food, and samples.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: To prepare for a Chicago legend, Dave makes a true Chicago hot dog. Then, Dave has an open and vulnerable conversation with an iconic Chicago restaurateur, Donnie Madia of One Off Hospitality, who is passionate about Chicago, his restaurants, good hospitality, and his style. After his interview, Dave answers a hot-dog-themed Ask Dave and finishes by making a new, unusual recipe for tavern-style pizza.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Journey back in time to uncover Boone's historic roots and savor its vibrant culinary scene. Chef Walter Staib tries his hand at fly-fishing and connects with modern pioneers shaping the region's food culture. Delve into the historic Tatum Cabin, where delightful recipes are prepared, capturing the essence of Boone's heritage.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Chef Walter Staib travels to the enchanting Pacific island of New Caledonia and discovers the harmonious fusion of French and indigenous Kanaky culture and the mouthwatering cuisine born from this blend. From a centuries-old Bougna recipe to the French pastry shops that dot the capital city, New Caledonia is a culinary treasure.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Chef Walter Staib explores the rich cultural heritage of New York City. From the diverse influences that have shaped the city for centuries, to a visit to a downtown restaurant that embodies its multicultural spirit. At the historic Harriton house, Chef Staib prepares recipes that pay homage to New York's roots.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Embark on a captivating history of Machias, Maine and the first naval battle of the Revolutionary War. Gain insight into the region's sustainable practices and the symbiotic relationship between the land and sea. Inspired by the local bounty, Chef Staib creates mouthwatering recipes that celebrate this remarkable coastal town.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Travel to Old Fort Harrod in Harrodsburg, Kentucky to explore the history of the fort and life of James Harrod. Joined by Mary Barlow, Chef Walter Staib pays tribute to the culinary heritage in the George Rogers Clark Cabin, they prepare historic recipes including a Kentucky Elk roast and a delightful Stack Cake, showcasing the traditional flavors of the region.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Chef Walter Staib takes a journey Down Under to Sydney, Australia, where he learns of the regenerative techniques Australian Farmers use to create delicious-tasting Beef and support a sustainable future for the planet. Get ready for a sizzling adventure that celebrates the flavors of Australia in true "Barbie" style!

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Join Chef Staib on a flavorful journey through Melbourne, Australia, as he dives into the vibrant culinary scene of this multicultural city. From meeting talented local chefs to uncovering the source of Australian lamb in the countryside, experience the diverse flavors and cultural pulse that make Melbourne a true food lover's paradise.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Chef Walter Staib explores Delaware's pivotal role in American history while savoring mouthwatering dishes like Spicy Corn Relish, Stewed Codfish, and Macaroons. Discover how Delaware's small but significant contributions helped shape American culture and politics, from its early Dutch and Swedish settlements to its crucial involvement in the Revolutionary War.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Chef Walter Staib travels into the heart of Oaxaca, Mexico to embark on a captivating journey that uncovers the art of Mezcal making, guided by local experts who reveal the secrets behind this beloved spirit. The mysteries of the ancient city of Monte Albán await discovery, while renowned Mexican Chef, Rodolfo Castellanos showcases the vibrant flavors of the central market's local cuisine.

programme.title: A Taste of History
programme.desc: Join us on a spirited journey as we explore the rich history of Applejack and Apple Brandy, discovering their colonial origins and witnessing the meticulous distillation process at America's oldest distillery. Chef Walter Staib returns to the historic Harriton House to fire up some apple-inspired recipes, including Scallopini of Pork with Stuffing, a sizzling Apple Flambé, and more.

programme.title: Travel Thru History
programme.desc: Ship off to Belfast, Northern Ireland and first get a tour of the colossal Titanic Museum. Then, learn about the province's complicated history at the Ulster Museum. Finally, get thrown into the slammer at the very creepy, Crumlin Road Jail.

programme.title: Curious Traveler
programme.desc: Yorkshire is replete with rolling hills, quaint stone cottages, and sprawling country estates. Why are country estates named Castles and Abbeys? What is The Shambles, and how did it get its name? Why is one of the largest medieval Gothic cathedrals in Europe in the small town of York?

programme.title: Rudy Maxa's World
programme.desc: Rudy answers London's call with an expert tour of its traditional sights and contemporary, cutting-edge attractions. In London's breathtaking countryside you will find mythic castles, the real Alice in Wonderland's candy store, Jane Austen's house, and the mysterious megaliths of Stonehenge.

programme.title: Tastes Like Home
programme.desc: James, Monica, and their families cannot believe how inspirational it was to taste flavors from Ireland after Catherine successfully prepares an incredible meal for them, followed by two deserts made from their mother Ann's own recipes.

programme.title: Laura McKenzie's Traveler
programme.desc: Begin on the east coast in Taormina. Laura then takes us to some of Sicily's highlight cities, Palermo and Randazzo. How about a visit to Agrigento, or to the divinely inspired Cathedral Monreale? We will also visit Mt. Etna, an active volcano.

programme.title: Elizabeth Stanton's Great Big World
programme.desc: Elizabeth, Rob, and Jennifer fly into the wild blue yonder and explore the world of aviation with the friendly people at the Good Year Base Airport and the Flightdeck Air Combat Center. They even get to fly in the Spirit of America Blimp.

programme.title: Laura McKenzie's Traveler
programme.desc: Queenstown is the adventure capital of the world. From bungee jumping to heli-skiing if you can think of it you can find it in Queenstown. Visitors refer to Queenstown as a natural theme park because of the variety of outdoor adventures it offers.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Mekong River, Vietnam: On the river, Tony drinks a lot of Mekong moonshine with the welcoming owners of a duck farm. Although seduced by his Vietnam experience, Tony is not sure the royal dish Birds Nest Soup is all its cracked up to be.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: In the Caribbean paradise of St. Martin, Tony eats a healthy Rastafarian meal with a freedom fighter, helps prepare grub for a food caravan, discovers foodstuffs not available at American supermarkets, and finally relaxes at a beach bar.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Tony sets out to find the real Singapore, with its multicultural restaurants and food markets. He samples prescription food dishes, explores the Geyland Serai Market, and rides the clean and efficient local subway.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: St. Petersburg, Russia: Tony plays spy in Russia and sets off to locate the best blinis and borscht St. Petersburg has to offer.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: New York, NY and Provincetown, MA: Experience the formative moments of Tony's career as he revisits his first job, the culinary institute that taught him the basics, a normal workday at Les Halles Brasserie, and his mysterious mentor, Bigfoot.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam: After taking a cyclo-ride through Ho Chi Minh City and trying various foods from roadside vendors and markets, Tony tests his might with a few shots of snake wine and a live cobra heart.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Portugal: Portuguese cuisine holds a dear place in Tony's culinary heart. Tony travels to Porto, home of the famous Port wine, where he is immediately exposed to the codfish and the almost mythical place it holds in Portuguese cuisine and culture.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Known as Brazil's capital of happiness, Salvador da Bahia offers fruitful local markets, and rich Bahian cuisine. Here, Tony takes part in a traditional local ceremony, and experiences the culinary talents of the famous Bahian artist of the kitchen - Chef Dada.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: A spontaneous layover in Bangkok, Thailand leads Tony into the city, where he tries dishes of deep-fried frog skins and pla rah, a fish-paste that has fermented anywhere from three months to a year.

The man who stole the property from him -- his corrupt uncle, Maj. Linton Cosgrave (Jim Davis) -- has no intention of handing it over, though. In fact, Linton turns Jet into the town outcast. Not going down without a fight, Jet hires gunmen to aid him in his battle, while a poor girl (Joan Evans) who loves him also joins his cause.

programme.title: Badman's Territory
programme.desc: After Jesse and Frank James rob a bank in a northern Texas country, Sheriff Mark Rowley (Randolph Scott) and his deputy brother Johnny (James Warren) pursue them into the "Badlands" territory, an outlaw haven not associated with any government. The James brothers are also wanted by a devious federal marshal, who battles Mark for their custody. Soon Mark and Johnny are embroiled with the Dalton Gang and an effort by a female newspaper owner (Ann Richards) to make the territory part of Oklahoma.

programme.title: Return of the Bad Men
programme.desc: In 1889 in Oklahoma Territory, the land rush attracts thousands, including many outlaws. A gang led by Wild Bill Doolan includes the Sundance Kid (Robert Ryan) and the Younger brothers, who intend to take advantage of the confusion to rob banks. Doolan's daughter, Cheyenne (Anne Jeffreys), helps the gang in a heist, but is wounded and taken in by ex-ranger Vance Cordell (Randolph Scott). Vance sets about to change her allegiance, despite the misgivings of his fiancée (Jacqueline White).

programme.title: Finny's First Day Of School - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Finny is a bit nervous on the first day of school, but Myrtle the Turtle is even more anxious and literally hides her shell! Surely Myrtle will come out of her shell when their teacher, a whale named Mr. Magellan, has them draw and present their favorite things to the class! Nope. Myrtle is even more nervous than ever! Being a good friend, Finny helps Myrtle through her anxiety, and the tiny turtle finally shows her drawing to everyone.

programme.title: Baby Shark - Finny The Shark and more
programme.desc: Baby Shark, Mama Shark, Papa Shark, Grandma Shark, and Grandpa Shark are out for a family swim and Baby Shark tries and tries to catch the little fishies but his skills aren’t yet up to the task. Just when he thinks he finally has them a (very big) friend of the little fishies steps in to save the day!

programme.title: Dharma's Digger - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Oh no! While digging deep at a top secret construction site, Dhama’s digger gets splashed with smelly sludge! Everyone says that Carl's Car Wash is the place to get all cleaned up, so Dharma skedaddles over to see how Carl can help. With a quick mess assessment and a few twists of some knobs, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Dharma’s vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! Dharma rolls out one happy customer, and ready to get back to work on the site that Carl is itching to see!

programme.title: Mr. Golden Sun - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Mister Sun, Sun, Mr. Golden Sun...please shine down on me! It’s the Mr. Sun song from Super Simple Songs!

programme.title: Finny's First Sleepover - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: It’s Finny’s first sleepover and Finny is nervous to sleep at Myrtle the Turtle’s house. Throughout the night, Finny becomes more and more comfortable and after a spooky story, Finny becomes the bravest of everyone at the sleepover! Finny can't wait to do a sleepover again – but this time, at Finny’s house!

programme.title: 10 Little Dinosaurs - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: 10 Stegosauruses! 10 Triceratopses! 10 Pterodactyls! 10 Brontosauruses! And 10 Tyrannosaurus Rex! Wow! This Super Simple counting song introduces the numbers 1-10 and also some very cool dinosaur names! Can you say them all?!

programme.title: Baby Shark & More Kids Songs - Super Simple Songs
programme.desc: 20 fun Super Simple Songs with Baby Shark, Five Little Ducks, Mr. Golden Sun, Ice Cream Song, and more!

programme.title: Driving In My Car - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Drive a car, ride a bike, row a boat, ride on a train, and fly an airplane with this playful and super fun song for kids; “Driving In My Car”! Driving in my car. Vroom vroom vroom. Driving very fast. Vroom vroom vroom. Driving very slow. Vroom vroom vroom. I like driving. Driving in my car.

programme.title: See You Later Alligator - Super Simple Puppets - Kids Songs - Super Simple
programme.desc: It’s time to go! Here’s a video featuring the Super Simple Puppets for our popular goodbye song, See You Later, Alligator. This is a fun song to sing at the end of a class, party, or play-date!

programme.title: 10 Little Dinosaurs - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: 10 Stegosauruses! 10 Triceratopses! 10 Pterodactyls! 10 Brontosauruses! And 10 Tyrannosaurus Rex! Wow! This Super Simple counting song introduces the numbers 1-10 and also some very cool dinosaur names! Can you say them all?!

programme.title: Rock Scissors Paper - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Ice Cream? Helicopter? What is it? Get your hands and fingers ready for this Super Simple Song for kids.

programme.title: Over The Deep Blue Sea - Puppets - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Yo-ho-ho! Review different types of weather while climbing aboard a pirate ship with the Super Simple Puppets! We’re going this way, that way. Forwards, backwards. Up and down, up and down. Over the deep blue sea.

programme.title: Five Little Chicks - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Five Little Chicks is great for nap time and for practicing counting down from five. Try singing along when it’s time for a nap.

programme.title: Rosey & The Rowdy Rustlers Tour Bus - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Rosey and The Rowdy Rustlers are coming to town to kick off their concert tour! But while driving out on the open road, a giant stray tumbleweed gets in the path of their tour bus, making a mighty mess! Rosey, Roxie, and Rude Jenny will have to take a detour to Carl’s Car Wash! With a quick mess assessment, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Rosey and The Rowdy Rustlers’ vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! The band leaves as happy customers, and just in time for the concert!

programme.title: Who Took The Cookie? (Finny the Shark) - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Finny’s friends are playing a game of Who Took The Cookie From The Cookie Jar. Who do you think took the cookie? The seahorse, the starfish, the octopus, the walrus, the dolphin, or the crab? Let’s play and find out!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Traver rescue a lizard 'dragon' in a rebuilt castle. Super Wings and Golden Siblings fix Alma's Northern Lights photos.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: On New Year's Eve, Jett's drained batteries struggle with an enlarged Times Square ball after time-traveling with the Super Wings for the countdown.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Novice Jibby, with Super Wings' help, lands safely in the Alps for Super Band's show. In Pixel-land, Alice and friends, aided by Super Wings, conquer challenges to enjoy fireworks.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Haruto's robot Metatron breaks down, activating villain Titan. Meanwhile, Jett and Marty build a rollercoaster and use magnets to reroute a stalled mile-long train.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Super Space Scouts and Jett, Matthew, and Dizzy chase a giant ball through a black hole. They save Earth from a moon-sized ball and deliver it to Mars.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Chloe and Dad escape a pterosaur world with a special glider after a time slip. Jett swaps roles, causing chaos with an inflatable duck, and learns teamwork.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Super Wings take Kamal and Nadia to the dinosaur era for a sports showdown, revealing all dinosaurs' strengths. In Scotland, they fix an inflatable playground for exhausted Nessie.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Lucie clean Amara's dad's underwater base and help an injured shark. Julian's safety gear interview reveals a crane's trouble and a forklift's heroics.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Dizzy help Louis with a chaotic tennis match and AI machine, leading to his success. Jett and Lucie recover a lost golden record from an alien spacecraft, sparking joy.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: At Noah’s park, Camira hunts block dino eggs with Super Wings, facing surprises when Golden Girl snatches the prize and the egg escapes! Powered by new pod gear, Camira triumphs, while Jett braves the Sahara to find Latu and a fennec fox.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Dizzy jet to Jeju, helping Taehoon’s robot save Grandma’s shellfish from a giant fish, then team up to free it. On Mars, Jett and Marty chase Roy's lost bags, while Jinga dazzles with an out-of-this-world tour.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Dizzy join Hazel and Runi in Australia to help animals escape wildfires, then fly to Seoul where tiny Antny enters the Strongest Bug Contest, faces rampaging rivals, and, with Super Wings’ upgrades, helps save the city.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Marty help wash Maxy the giant plane and calm geysers at Oyunuma Pond, then deliver a Wright Flyer to Braden, sparking a time-hop to the Wright brothers, where teamwork lifts spirits and the Flyer takes flight.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett, Lucie, and Runi’s friendly contest becomes teamwork when they rescue toys from a Vietnam factory fire. Soon, Jett races to Dino World, freeing stranded friends and reuniting a T-Rex family as quakes rumble. Super Wings deliver!

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Noah and the Dino Wings turn hail into fruit seeds, planting a thriving farm with Jett’s help and saving Dino World from a flood. Later, teamwork and a daring rescue inside Supersaurus bring the friends closer as everyone returns home safe.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: In Sicily, Jett and Curie foil invisibility pranks and stop a wild volcano eruption with Curie’s snow launcher, teaching Renata as chaos turns to learning. Aboard Ned’s ship, Super Electric Suits help them rescue everyone from a junk robot.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: While the World Spaceport celebrates Jimbo’s retirement, Jett faces a UFO and Space Monster, piloting World Robot as chaos erupts. The team unites, time freezes, and Jimbo reveals Megamon is an old friend, choosing to stay with everyone.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Sing along to your favorite classical melodies and enjoy engaging imagery in this space and sky themed episode. Young viewers can learn words like star and moon through repetition and narration, explore with the Baby Einstein characters, or simply dance along.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies grow, their eye-hand coordination begins to improve as their ability to interact with their surroundings blossoms. It is the perfect time for My First Signs, A playful introduction to 20 common words and phrases from baby's world -- including ''mommy'', ''daddy'' and ''I love you'' -- both Spoken and in Sign Language.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Sharing the joys and traditions of the holiday season with your little one is truly one of the greatest gifts of parenthood, and Baby Santa's Music Box makes this magical time even more special! Celebrate by treating your baby and yourself to a captivating wonderland of bright lights, sparkling ornaments, sleigh bells, toys, winter scenes, jolly Santas and more -- all accompanied by beloved holiday melodies.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Baby Mozart is an introduction to Mozart's beautiful music, which has been proven to have positive affects on people of all ages, especially babies. Images of brightly colored toys and known objects aid in the audio presentation of child-friendly arrangements and sound effects.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Isn't the world exciting?! Learn about things found in nature like flowers, grass, trees, and leaves with real-life footage and narration. Sing-along to popular nursery rhymes and learn about common bedtime themes. Teach baby how to say words like eat, milk, and all done verbally and through sign language. Discover words and activities about playtime and friendship.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones become better acquainted with the world, they grow curious about animals of all kinds, beyond just the family pet. And as their communication skills continue to develop, they enjoy imitating animal sounds as well. Baby Noah Animal Expedition takes your little explorer across the globe to meet animals -- two-by-two -- from the savannah, the rainforest and tropics, the Outback, the ocean and the Polar Regions.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover the exciting world of shapes and colors! Learn about the primary colors red, yellow, and blue with real-life imagery of animals and objects. Explore colors like purple, orange, and green and see artwork by Van Gogh! Discover the circles, squares, and triangles that surround us in everyday life, and introduce baby to the world of visual arts as children and artists create their own work!

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Learn about the numbers 1,2,3,4 & 5 through rhyme, real-life footage, counting, stories, and repetition - accompanied by classical music and real world imagery.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Babies love animals, and now you can bring animals from the seven continents home to your baby. Meet dozens of exotic animals including Asian pandas, Australian kangaroos and Arctic snow monkeys...all filmed in their beautiful, natural habitats. Rhythms and songs inspired by faraway lands have been orchestrated especially for little ears and encourage your baby to sing, dance and play to the world beats. You'll laugh together at the funny puppet shows featuring moms and their baby animals.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: From the moment babies are born, they use their developing senses to discover the world. In terms of sight, bold patterns in contrasting colors or black and white are initially preferred. As for sounds, Mother s gentle voice, in any language, is music to baby's ears. Language Nursery: Voices From Many Lands acquaints your baby with the sounds of foreign language by presenting delightful, visually stimulating images accompanied by spoken passages, natural sounds and music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Learn all about music and rhythm in the world around us! Discover classical music and learn instrument names through narration and repetition. Sing and dance along to classic rhythmic songs like The Wheels on the Bus and see real-life images of instruments.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As each day passes, babies' awareness of the world around them -- and all the wonders it holds -- continues to develop. Wild animals are especially intriguing and World Animals captures the spirtit of little ones' fascination with wild creatures as it introduces them to animals living in the jungle, in the ocean, and on the savannah.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The sinister Robotnik blackmails Cyrus, an old friend of Sonic's, by holding his father hostage.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: On a trip to Port Mobius, Sonic, Manic and Sonia are told that ships are sinking due to the Mobian sea-beast.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: While lost in the wastelands of Mobius, Sonic, Manic and Sonia stumble upon an oasis called Lake Valley Resort.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonia is invited to a debutante ball, but before she can be officially announced to society, she and her brothers, Manic and Sonic have an important mission.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Robotnik organizes a track meet to lure Sonic into a trap.

programme.title: Sonic Underground

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Tails brings a new friend home to Knothole - a baby Terra-Pod who has strayed from the herd that is currently migrating. Sonic, Sally, and some of the other Freedom Fighters return the Baby-T to its mom and the rest of the herd.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic reluctantly takes Tails with him to the Big City to find some cotter pins for the Freedom Fighters catapults. While in the City, Sonic is nearly eaten alive by his old dog Muttski, now a roboti-sized guard dog in the Junk Heaps

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: The Freedom Fighters, with new addition, Dulcy, develop a De-Roboti-sizer and try it out on Bunnie. It's a success and, against Sally's wishes, Sonic battles Robotnik's newest weapon, a Virtual Reality Shriek-Bot.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: The Freedom Fighters run into a Swashbuckler, named Ari, battling Swat-Bots. Sonic diverts them, allowing Ari to escape. After hearing that Robotnik is holding his band of Freedom Fighters hostage, Ari decides to help Sonic free them.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic attempts a solo rescue to prevent prisoners from being roboti-sized and is hit by a Memory Scrambler that erases short-term memory.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After a disastrous failed mission, Sonic laments that they can't go back and prevent Robotnik's take-over. Dulcy tells them they can and takes Sonic and Sally to the Floating Island where they find the "Time Stones".

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails befriend a pair of aliens who crash land their spaceship on Mobius. Sonic has to avoid Robotnik's ULTRA-GRAVITIZER (sort of a hedgehog flypaper) to help fix their ship and blast-off back home.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic rescues Lucas, a rival of Robotnik's, from Robotnik's dungeons. But Robotnik will do anything to keep Lucas from finding his lost love, Lucinda, including proposing to her himself.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Coconuts is exiled by Robotnik to a remote jungle, where he uses a giant baby ape to destroy villages. But Sonic exposes Coconuts as a robot, and the baby ape's real Dad takes Coconuts and the baby ape away for a spanking.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Outraged by a new hit song written about Sonic, Robotnik outlaws music on Mobius then takes pop star, Catty Carlisle captive. With his MD (Music Destroyer) Robot, Robotnik terrorizes the music loving Mobius population till Sonic rescues Catty.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: There is a new menu at the restaurant, which is very popular. There is a long line in front of the restaurant but there weren't enough staff members to serve the villagers the food. Rainbow Ruby turns into a waitress using her magic suitcase and serve tables kindly. // Rainbow Village is full of marbles. The marbles that Rainbow Ruby spilled in her room poured down into the village from up above the sky! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a paramedic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina, Thunderbell, and Choco try to cheer Jessy up but their efforts are of no use. While talking to Mayor Ling Ling, Rainbow Ruby realizes that today is the day that Jessy first arrived in Rainbow Village! Jessy was upset that her friends forgot such a meaningful day to her. // Ling Ling has caught a bad cold and was sneezing all over the place. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a doctor and cares for him.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried about the play planned for tonight. There are no costumes ready for the villagers so it's hard to figure out which roles they're playing. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a costume designer and designs costumes for her friends. // It is very windy in Rainbow village and Paige, a paper doll, is flying to wherever the wind takes her. She is so light that she is blown away by the wind. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a fire fighter and rescue Paige.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried that the villagers are all in low spirits. Ruby thinks of fun games to play but the villagers say that they have already played all of the games too many times. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a singer. // Ling Ling is worried because of the "Secret Present Swapping Party" that Thunderbell is preparing. Thunderbell forgot to send out the invitations. Rainbow Ruby turns into a mail carrier and delivers the invitations.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that a Rainbow Ball Tournament is about to start soon but he is worried because the field is covered with pokey pods. Then Ellie tells her she lost her needles, Gina her hat, and Thunderbell his wheels. Who could have taken away all these things?

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby is looking at shoes that are now too small for her but she is unwilling to throw away. Ling Ling is worried about Thunderbell. programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is waiting for Rainbow Ruby, looking worried. It turns out that Mr. Sloth's best friend Chirpee is depressed. Paige very much wants to go to the party but she cannot go without a dress.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: In Rainbow Village, people are busy preparing for a dance marathon, a competition in which all of the villagers participate. Ling Ling is very sad that Ellie decided not to participate. Ellie is not a confident dancer so she doesn't want to participate. // Rainbow Ruby's friends tell her that they are now friends with Felicia. programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wants to become a movie actress but the villagers have no idea how to direct a movie. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a movie director. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a babysitter and starts babysitting the children.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Princess Kiki is asleep, UP IN THE AIR! programme.desc: Peppermint Fizz wants to exclude a new girl, Blueberry Muffin, because she's "different" - in the way she looks, lives, talks, etc.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Out gathering berries one day, Strawberry & her pets find a tiny fairy among the berry vines. Realizing that Strawberry is a very kind & caring person, the little fairy decides to take advantage of the kid's good nature.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: One windy day, a tiny fairy named Sherry Bobbleberry gets blown into Strawberry's open window. She is a klutzy little thing who is convinced she will always be a major goof-up.

programme.desc: Apple Dumplin' wants to help Strawberry & her Friends with the baking. But Dumplin's just a little too little to be much help. In fact, she ends up making a pretty big mess of things.

programme.title: Reading Rainbow
programme.desc: Amy Linker reads a story about a family that has to replace furniture lost in a fire.

programme.title: Reading Rainbow
programme.desc: Andrew Lei reads a story about a boy who was adopted by a couple who wanted a child.

programme.desc: LeVar visits a factory where the goods for the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade are stored.

programme.desc: Robert Guillaume reads the poem My Shadow, by Robert Louis Stephenson.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Sarah and Tony create a beautiful birdhouse to place out in the park. They are happy to learn that the birds will have lots of company; many other animals make their homes in the park too! Barney and the kids travel around the park, noticing and discussing all the various animals that call the park home.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: The children realize its normal to experience all different types of emotions. With Barneys help, the children learn all about how to handle how they are feeling, especially feeling happy, sad, and angry.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: After creating a friends and family tree for a school project, the children discuss all the people in their lives they care about. This provides a perfect opportunity for Barney and his friends to learn about love and relationships.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: A fun day in the park with friends involves a musical rhythm clapping game. Barney introduces a new game that helps reinforce learning about music, rhythm, and musical instruments. This new found inspiration causes the kids to make their very own marching band.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Its a great day to move around in the park! Barney and his friends have fun with creative movement, while learning new dances, having races, and acting out a story. These activities teach the kids how they can move their bodies while doing different activities.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Marcos accidentally breaks an art show project that Melanie has made. Afraid that she will be angry, he doesn't say anything, but then feels guilty. Barney helps him see that honesty is the best policy. Meanwhile, Myra, has decided she doesn't like her name. After learning about many names and what they mean, Barney helps Myra see how special her name truly is.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Melanie is sad because she misses her friend, Marisa who is visiting relatives in India. Barney takes her and the other kids on a trip to the magic caboose to visit pretend countries like Egypt, Tahiti, and India. When they were in a pretend country of India, they saw a real elephant and in the end, Melanie gets a email from her friend in India (who has also seen a real elephant in India!). BJ wants to be a great magician, but he doesn't want to spend any time practicing. He convinces Baby Bop to help him do a trick, and makes her disappear. When BJ thought she is gone forever, he realizes the importance of practice. Luckily, Baby Bop hasn't disappeared after all!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney and his friends are decorating the caboose for Christmas when Barney decides to plan a Secret Santa game. Everyone has to buy or make a gift for the friend whose name they have drawn. Melanie misses the mailman, so Barney takes her to Santa's workshop at the North Pole to deliver her wish list in person.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Riff decides to create a musical zoo when their zoo trip is postponed. Gathering instruments that sound like real animals, Riff gives Barney and his friends a zoo-mazing experience. When Baby Bop hesitates on keeping her promise to watch Ryan's pet frog, Barney tells her the story of The Frog Prince. And Baby Bop learns about keeping her promises.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Baby Bop finds out that Daniel is going on a trip the next day, she wants to go on a trip as well. Everyone decides to pretend to travel the same way Daniel will travel. First, they all make cardboard cars out of some scrap boxes. Next, everyone pretends to be an airplane. Then Barney turns the cardboard airplanes into a great big cardboard bus. They go on a camera safari only to discover the last mode of their transportation--a big cardboard cruise ship.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: After noticing parts of the moon are missing in the night sky, Baby Bop is determined to find the rest of it. It's up to Barney and the kids to help Baby Bop take a trip to outer space where they meet Mr. Moon. Baby Bop then learns that the moon is not always full at night.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Daniel fails miserably when he tries to join the others in jump rope. Convinced that he's too little to do anything right, Barney tells him the story of The Sword in the Sandbox. Through the legend of King Arthur, Daniel learns there are many things he can do... if he tries hard enough.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Riff is asked to be captain of a baseball team, he doesnt think he can do it. But Barney gives him the courage to try, by recounting the tale of his great-great-grandfather Riffle the Wild West hero!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Melanie comes up with the perfect idea to get people to donate to Grace's food drive - put on a movie premiere in the caboose! Barney and friends pitch in to help, but they all have different ideas about what kind of movie to make. Everything they try falls apart. It's curtains for Melanie's movie until she comes up with a blockbuster idea of her own.

programme.title: Barney and Friends
